issues.title: Cache warmup script should handle empty repositories
issues.body: Demo issue 1. The cache warmup path exits with a noisy error when the repository has no prior artifacts.

issues.title: Document sandbox policy reload command
issues.body: Demo issue 2. Add the exact openshell policy set command to the runbook so operators do not restart the sandbox.

issues.title: Fix README typo in agent setup section
issues.body: Demo issue 3. Small doc fix used for the Build stage write attempt.
